## IT291R3 ARCHIVED - Transfer of Property to a Corporation Under Subsection 85(1)

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
This bulletin discusses the conditons that permit to proceed with a rollover of eligible proprety to a taxable Canadian corporation.
